metadata.theme: India-centric (Delhi markets, cricket, food, Metro, festivals)

geom_bindu.question: Delhi Metro map par ek station ko represent karne ke liye kaunsa geometric object use hota hai?
geom_bindu.hint: Station sirf position batata hai, uska size nahi hota — jaise geometric point!

geom_bindu.question: Ek Bindu (Point) ki kitni dimensions hoti hain?
geom_bindu.hint: Point sirf location dikhata hai, iska koi length, width ya height nahi hota.

geom_bindu.question: Rohan ne apni notebook par point P banaya. Is point ko kaise label karenge?
geom_bindu.hint: Geometric points hamesha capital letters se denote kiye jaate hain!

geom_bindu.question: Ek point ke through kitni lines pass ho sakti hain?
geom_bindu.hint: Chandni Chowk ke bich mein khade ho kar jitni dishaon mein dekh sakte ho — utni lines!

geom_bindu.question: Tara ne apne school aur ghar ko Delhi Metro map par do points se mark kiya. Points ke beech ki shortest distance kya kehlati hai?
geom_bindu.hint: Do fixed points ke beech ki shortest path ko segment kehte hain.

geom_bindu.question: Ek point ka size hota hai?
options: Nahi, point ka koi size nahi ✅
geom_bindu.hint: Point sirf position batata hai — jaise aapki naak ka tip, zara sa bhi space nahi leta!

geom_bindu.question: Agar ek paper par 5 different points hain, to unhein kaise identify karenge?
options: A, B, C, D, E capital letters se ✅
a, b, c, d, e small letters se
geom_bindu.hint: Har point ka apna unique naam capital letter mein hota hai.

geom_bindu.question: Makar Sankranti par patang ki dor par dot kaunsa geometric concept hai?
options: Sirf ek visual dot, geometric point nahi ✅
geom_bindu.hint: Visual dot ka size hota hai, geometric point ka nahi — farak hai!

geom_bindu.question: Ek line par kitne points ho sakte hain?
geom_bindu.hint: Rekha anant lambi hoti hai, toh us par anant points aa sakte hain!

geom_bindu.question: Geometry mein point ko define karte waqt kaunsa kathan sahi hai?
options: Point sirf position batata hai, size zero ✅
geom_bindu.hint: Zero dimensions = sirf position, koi aur property nahi.

geom_rekha.question: Rajpath par military parade ki line — yeh geometric line ka example hai?
geom_rekha.hint: Rajpath dono taraf infinity tak nahi jaata... actually yeh ek road section hai.

geom_rekha.question: Ek Rekha (Line) ke kitne endpoints hote hain?
geom_rekha.hint: Rekha dono taraf infinity tak jaati hai, isliye koi end point nahi hota.

geom_rekha.question: Rekha ko kaise represent karte hain?
geom_rekha.hint: Dono taraf arrowheads ka matlab hai ki line dono taraf jaati rehti hai!

geom_rekha.question: Do point A aur B se hote hue ek line ka naam kya hoga?
geom_rekha.hint: Line ke dono taraf arrowheads hote hain, aur naam do points se aata hai.

geom_rekha.question: Railway tracks parallel lines ka example hain. Yeh kyun parallel hain?
options: Kyunki woh same length ki hain
Kyunki woh steel ki bani hain
geom_rekha.hint: Parallel lines ki definition: woh lines jo kabhi nahi milti, chahe kitna bhi extend karo.

geom_rekha.question: Line LM likhne ka sahi tarika kya hai?
geom_rekha.hint: Line ka symbol dono taraf arrowheads ke saath hota hai ↔️

geom_rekha.question: Ek Rekha ki length hoti hai?
geom_rekha.hint: Rekha dono taraf anant lambi hoti hai, isliye iski koi fixed length nahi.

geom_rekha.question: Connaught Place ka circular design kis geometric concept se related hai?
geom_rekha.hint: Circle mein center se boundary tak jaane wali line radius kehlati hai — ek special type ki segment.

geom_rekha.question: Ek line, do different points se — kitni lines draw kar sakte hain?
geom_rekha.hint: Do points ke beech mein sirf ek hi straight line ho sakti hai.

geom_rekha.question: Rekha aur Segment mein main antar kya hai?
geom_rekha.hint: Rekha dono taraf infinity, segment fixed length ka hota hai.

geom_khand.question: Delhi se Meerut tak ka expressway section ek example hai:
geom_khand.hint: Do fixed points ke beech ka part — jaise Delhi se Meerut fixed distance!

geom_khand.question: Ek segment AB ki length 7cm hai. Iske kitne endpoints hain?
geom_khand.hint: Segment hamesha do fixed points (endpoints) ke beech hota hai.

geom_khand.question: Segment ko kaise likhte hain?
geom_khand.hint: Segment ke dono ends par dots (•) ya small circles hote hain.

geom_khand.question: Rohan ke paas 12cm ka ek scale hai. Yeh scale geometric term mein kya hai?
geom_khand.hint: Scale ki length fixed hai, do points ke beech — bilkul segment ki tarah!

geom_khand.question: Agar segment PQ ki length 5cm hai, toh P aur Q ke beech kitne points hain?
geom_khand.hint: Segment chhota ho ya bada, us par anant points hote hain!

geom_kiran.question: Suraj ki kiran (sunray) ka geometric name kya hai?
geom_kiran.hint: Suraj se start hokar anant tak jaati hai — ek origin, infinite direction!

geom_kiran.question: Ek Kiran (Ray) ke kitne endpoints hote hain?
geom_kiran.hint: Ray ka ek fixed starting point hota hai, doosri taraf infinity.

geom_kiran.question: Laser pointer se nikalne wali light beam kya hai?
geom_kiran.hint: Laser pointer se start → ek disha mein jaati hai → Ray!

geom_kiran.question: Ray AB ka matlab kya hai?
options: A se start, B ki taraf infinity ✅
B se start, A ki taraf
geom_kiran.hint: Ray mein pehla point origin hota hai, doosra direction batata hai.

geom_kiran.question: Flashlight se nikalta light beam ek ray ka example hai. Iska origin kya hai?
geom_kiran.hint: Jahan se light start hoti hai — woh origin (endpoint) hai!

geom_shikhar.question: Kite (patang) ke jis point par do sides milti hain, usey kya kehte hain?
geom_shikhar.hint: Jahan do lines ya rays milti hain, woh vertex/shikhar kehlata hai.

geom_shikhar.question: Ghar ki chhat ka slope kis geometric concept se measure karte hain?
geom_shikhar.hint: Chhat aur ground ke beech ka jhukaav angle (kon) se measure kiya jaata hai.

geom_shikhar.question: Ek angle ke arms kaise bante hain?
geom_shikhar.hint: Angle do rays se banta hai jo ek common point (vertex) par milti hain.

geom_shikhar.question: Clock ki sui 3:00 baje kitne degrees ka angle banati hai?
geom_shikhar.hint: 3:00 baje, minute sui 12 par, hour sui 3 par — right angle!

geom_shikhar.question: Tara ne apne ghar ke chhat par ek triangular skylight dekha. Uske teen angles ka sum kitna hota hai?
geom_shikhar.hint: Kisi bhi triangle ke teen angles ka sum hamesha 180 degrees hota hai!

maxmin_max.question: IPL match mein scores hain: 178, 145, 201, 167. Sabse bada score (Maximum) kya hai?
maxmin_max.hint: Maximum = list mein sabse bada number. Sab numbers compare karo, jo sabse bada ho woh Max!

maxmin_max.question: Rajasthan ka temperature: 42°C, 38°C, 50°C, 45°C. Maximum temp kitna hai?
maxmin_max.hint: Sare temperatures compare karo — Rajasthan summer mein sabse garm temperature max hai!

maxmin_max.question: Karol Bagh mein 5 dhabon ke samosa rates: Rs 12, Rs 15, Rs 10, Rs 20, Rs 18. Maximum rate kya hai?
maxmin_max.hint: Sabse mehnga wala rate dekho — wohi maximum hai!

maxmin_max.question: Test scores: -5, -2, 0, 3, -8. Maximum score kya hai?
maxmin_max.hint: Negative numbers mein bada woh hota hai jo zero ke closest ho. 3 sabse bada!

maxmin_max.question: Cricket coach ke paas 4 batsmen ke scores hain: 56, 102, 34, 89. Maximum score kis batsman ka hai?
maxmin_max.hint: Jo score sabse bada (century!) hai, woh maximum hai.

maxmin_min.question: Leh ka winter temperature: -10°C, -5°C, -15°C, -3°C. Minimum temperature kya hai?
maxmin_min.hint: Minimum = sabse chhota. Negative mein, jitna zyada negative, utna chhota!

maxmin_min.question: Lajpat Nagar mein dupatta prices: Rs 250, Rs 180, Rs 320, Rs 150, Rs 400. Minimum price kya hai?
maxmin_min.hint: Sabse sasta wala — wohi minimum price hai!

maxmin_min.question: Tara ke 5 tests ke scores: 85, 72, 68, 91, 78. Minimum score kitna hai?
maxmin_min.hint: Scores ko arrange karo chhote se bade, sabse chhota minimum hoga.

maxmin_min.question: Elevation of Indian cities: Shimla 2205m, Manali 2625m, Leh 3500m, Ooty 2240m. Minimum elevation kya hai?
maxmin_min.hint: Sabse neeche (lowest) elevation wala city — minimum!

maxmin_min.question: Rohan ne 4 mobiles ka price dekha: Rs 12,999, Rs 8,499, Rs 15,999, Rs 6,999. Minimum price kya hai?
maxmin_min.hint: Sabse affordable wala mobile — minimum price!

maxmin_range.question: IPL match scores: 178 (min) aur 234 (max). Range kitna hai?
maxmin_range.hint: Range = Maximum - Minimum = 234 - 178 = 56. Score ka phailaav!

maxmin_range.question: Delhi ka temperature: Min 15°C, Max 42°C. Range of temperature kya hai?
maxmin_range.hint: Range = 42 - 15 = 27. Delhi ke mausam ka pura phailaav!

maxmin_range.question: Samosa rates: Rs 10 (min), Rs 25 (max). Range kya hai?
maxmin_range.hint: Sabse mehnga aur sabse sasta samosa ka antar = Range!

maxmin_range.question: Test scores: 55, 82, 71, 94, 68. Pehle maximum aur minimum find karo, phir range batao.
maxmin_range.hint: Pehle max=94 aur min=55 find karo, phir 94 - 55 = 39!

maxmin_range.question: Rohan ne 4 alag-alag brands ke shoes prices dekhe. Max Rs 4,999 aur min Rs 1,299. Range kya hai?

compare_basics.question: Maths gator (crocodile) hamesha kaunsa number khata hai?
compare_basics.hint: Crocodile ka muh (>) hamesha bade number ki taraf khulta hai!

compare_basics.question: 98,720 aur 89,999 mein kaunsa bada hai?
compare_basics.hint: Pehle ten thousands place dekho: 9 vs 8 — 9 bada hai!

compare_basics.question: Delhi population: 1.9 crore, Mumbai: 2.1 crore. Kaunsa shahar zyada populated hai?
compare_basics.hint: Compare karo 2.1 crore vs 1.9 crore — 2.1 bada hai!

compare_basics.question: Rohan ke paas Rs 500 hai, Tara ke paas Rs 750 hai. Kaunse paas zyada paise hain?
compare_basics.hint: Compare karo: 750 > 500, isliye Tara ke paas zyada hain.

compare_basics.question: Number line par -5 aur -10 mein kaunsa bada hai?
compare_basics.hint: Number line par right side ka number hamesha bada hota hai! -5, -10 se right mein hai.

compare_basics.question: Chandni Chowk ke do shops: Shop A ki daily income Rs 12,500, Shop B ki Rs 10,800. Kaun sa inequality sahi hai?
compare_basics.hint: 12 hazar 500, vs 10 hazar 800 — pehle thousands compare karo.

compare_basics.question: Ek cricket match mein India ne 287 runs banaye, Pakistan ne 263 runs. India ka score Pakistan se:
Number line par koi bhi do numbers — right wala number hamesha hota hai:
compare_basics.hint: Number line par right direction mein badhne par value badhti hai.

compare_basics.question: -18 aur -42 mein kaunsa mathematically bada hai?
compare_basics.hint: -18, -42 se zyada positive (less debt) hai — isliye bada!

compare_basics.question: IPL match mein Virat ne 82 runs, Rohit ne 79 runs. Virat runs ___ Rohit runs.

compare_decimals.question: Lassi stall A: Rs 40.50, Lassi stall B: Rs 40.05. Kaunsa sasta hai?
compare_decimals.hint: Pehle whole number compare: 40 vs 40 same. Phir decimal: .50 vs .05 — .05 chhota hai!

compare_decimals.question: Petrol price: Pump X Rs 104.56 per litre, Pump Y Rs 104.65 per litre. Kaunsa sasta hai?
Tara ne 2.5 meter aur Rohan ne 2.25 meter cloth kharida. Kisne zyada cloth kharida?
Kaunsa descending order (bade se chhote) mein sahi hai?
compare_decimals.hint: Pehle 0.75 (75 hundredths), phir 0.57 (57 hundredths), phir 0.075 (75 thousandths = 7.5 hundredths).

compare_rounding.question: Chandni Chowk ke banya ka bill Rs 642.75 hai. Nearest rupee mein round karo.
compare_rounding.hint: Paisa .75 hai — 0.50 se upar, toh UP round. 643!

compare_rounding.question: Population of a town is 42,876. Nearest thousand mein round karo.
Haldiram ka bill Rs 1289.50 hai. Nearest hundred mein round karo.
Rohan ki school mein attendance 99.85% hai. Nearest whole number mein round karo.
compare_rounding.hint: .85 >= .50, toh upar round. 100%! Masti kar lo!

compare_rounding.question: Metro ki daily ridership: 27,54,321. Nearest lakh mein round karo.
compare_rounding.hint: Nearest lakh: 27,54,321, digits in lakh place 7. Next digit 5? Wait, we round 7 to 8 since next digit is 5? Actually nearest lakh: 27,50,000 kyunki 54,321 < 50,000 nahi, 54,321 > 50,000. So 27,50,000 + 50,000 = 28,00,000? No. Let me recalculate.

compare_place.question: Number 5,83,794 mein digit 5 ka place value kya hai?
Kaunsa bada hai: 4,250 ya 4,025?
compare_place.hint: Thousands same (4), hundreds compare: 2 vs 0 — 2 > 0, isliye 4,250 bada!

compare_place.question: India mein place value system ke hisaab se 1 Crore mein kitne Lakhs hote hain?
compare_place.hint: 1 Crore = 100 Lakhs. 1 Lakh = 100 Thousands. Isliye 1 Crore = 100 Lakhs!

compare_place.question: Number 87,42,965 mein 7 ka place value kya hai?
compare_place.hint: 7 Lakhs ke place par hai. 87,42,965 = 87 Lakhs, 42 Thousands, 965!

compare_place.question: Number 80,05,321 mein 0 ka place value batao, jo lakhs aur hundreds ke beech hai.
compare_place.hint: Place value 0 ka bhi hota hai — us place par koi value nahi hai. 0 × 10,000 = 0!

compare_order.question: Cricket scores 3 matches: India 287, Australia 263, England 245. Ascending order mein arrange karo.
compare_order.hint: Ascending = chhote se bade. Pehle 245, phir 263, phir 287!

compare_order.question: Samosa prices: Rs 12, Rs 8, Rs 15, Rs 10. Descending order mein arrange karo.
compare_order.hint: Descending = bade se chhote. Pehle Rs 15 (mehnga), phir Rs 12, Rs 10, Rs 8 (sasta).

compare_order.question: Bookshop ki 4 books ke prices: Rs 499, Rs 249, Rs 799, Rs 349. Inhein ascending order mein likho.
compare_order.hint: Sabse sasta Rs 249, phir Rs 349, phir Rs 499, phir Rs 799 (mehnga).

compare_order.question: Descending order mein kaunsa sequence sahi hai?
compare_order.hint: Descending = bade se chhote. Positive > 0 > negative. 10 → 5 → 0 → -5 → -10.

compare_order.question: Temperature 4 cities: Delhi (32°C), Shimla (18°C), Leh (-5°C), Mumbai (35°C). Ascending order?
